textByHash.cf17da2a870f1c34b8b0ac7f1ee96df16149b375: Hey! Who are you and why are you here?
textByHash.48004b6237d1c33dcba7a58cd06cce9e0dd31d0b: Weapons? You'd better talk to Veliaf then. I'll be keeping an eye on you though, so don't go trying anything.
textByHash.57390a0979301624c6ca56e4aaa92fd96c7e099b: I'm keeping my eye on you. Nothing personal. We just need to be careful with newcomers. Anyway, Veliaf will want to speak to you.
textByHash.d49b3a44056e29a065e7afad0702169336bb312a: Hello there. Forgive me if I seem cautious of you. We just need to be careful with newcomers.
textByHash.9e062a42fb71830c0ac9bf0bcf1fcaf5bfbe46d6: Hello there. What can I do for you?
textByHash.0e4eac948264de65b4bf346560bdba98a3ab77a8: Sure. I'll do my best to answer them.
textByHash.d07895a81088843ae3c34d7c6d3a188106a5e963: Cheating death seems to be my main role. I'm the main fighter for the group so I'm always in the thick of it. It's gone okay for me so far though.
textByHash.065e84a175bd6624809eeffee6706185503a3eaf: We're a good team, though many of the others haven't had any proper training before. I used to be in a militia so I've been trying to share my knowledge as best I can.
textByHash.2edbe56ae3fec516a99162f393d5ae597d404967: In most cases we end up having to improvise though. Thankfully, this lot are good at that. Ivan over there, he saved our bacon in a recent run in with some juves.
textByHash.24036edd86d069bb7c4cd530da033dc4b98239aa: Juveniles, the lowest form of vampyre. We come across them quite often around here. They may be the weakest vampyres but they're still very dangerous.
textByHash.c790c4819a3abbfad5f80bd5ed8b4c3e965fb843: They're stronger and faster than many well trained soldiers, and twice as bloodthirsty.
textByHash.2ed75d5bba07f7c406c88f0e368928cb7949f7de: The situation is grave. It would be dangerous to think differently.
textByHash.144d30085b040c93b9dba096f53e7dc08d7cab03: We're really up against it, but we have no choice. This is a battle for our very existence and we need to employ any tactics to achieve our goal.
textByHash.cad0d77c6fa9cbccc2796644c6871e6e017ecaca: Yes, I hear them all the time. I don't pay any attention to them though.
